name: wpwing-sticky-block
description: Sticky Block for Gutenberg — make any content follow your visitors as they scroll.
author: WPWing

scripts.dist: npm run build && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/wpwing-sticky-block && cp -r build docs readme.txt wpwing-sticky-block.php dist/wpwing-sticky-block/ && cd dist && zip -r wpwing-sticky-block.zip wpwing-sticky-block && rm -rf wpwing-sticky-block
